title: Lumia Security
description: Lumia Security—s AI Security and Governance platform helps organizations adopt AI safely, offering visibility, control, and risk mitigation across thousands of applications without disrupting productivity or creating a negative user experience.

items: Enforce role- & task-based access policies across agent populations & their tool access.
Align control evidence with frameworks like EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, & ISO/IEC 42001.
